name: Sylvan Princessprite
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>姫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>芽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みや</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2 Level 1 monsters
You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; excavate the top card of your Deck, and if it is a Spell/Trap, add it to your hand. Otherwise, send it to the GY. You can send 1 other Plant monster from your hand or face-up from your field to the GY, then target 1 "Sylvan" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Sylvan Princessprite" once per turn.

action: Adds excavated cards to the hand
Sends excavated cards to the Graveyard
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
